---
title: "PKP/OJS multi-source journal enrichment"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This notebook runs a purposive validation sample of ten source-authentic PKP
OJS rows. The sample exercises merge branches and is not representative of the
full PKP/OJS cohort. The same code also exposes an explicit full-run mode.

```{r}
#| label: red-contract

fixture_path <- file.path(
  "..",
  "data",
  "ojs-journal-enrichment-sample.csv"
)

stopifnot(
  file.exists(fixture_path),
  exists("fetch_openalex_batch", mode = "function"),
  exists("fetch_crossref_journal", mode = "function"),
  exists("enrich_ojs_rows", mode = "function")
)
```
